positions.description: Part of the frontend team building choicehotels.com — booking flow, property pages, rate filters, and responsive mobile components serving millions of monthly users.
highlights: Optimized Rate Plans API integration, reducing page-load calls from 50 to 3–4
Conducted LCP performance spike analyzing SPA hydration gaps and preload strategies
Delivered Rate Type Filters with multi-select comparison and lowest-rate logic
Migrated JS components to TypeScript and resolved WCAG accessibility bugs
Implemented A/B testing integrations and mentored junior developers

positions.description: Built role-based admin dashboards, SPA landing pages, and CI/CD workflows.
highlights: Built admin dashboards with React and MaterialUI for internal operations
Configured CI/CD workflows via GitHub Actions
Implemented unit testing suites with Jest and RTL

positions.description: Led frontend development, architecture decisions, and code reviews.
highlights: Led frontend architecture and coordinated with cross-functional teams
Conducted code reviews and mentored team members
